product_direction: Clarify the empty-state action on the setup page.

stakeholder_effects.effect: Clearer setup can reduce delayed invitations.

unresolved_assumptions: Whether copy or missing product guidance causes the hesitation.
strongest_signal: Support notes and session replays show repeated hesitation at the same empty state.
riskiest_claim: Clearer copy will improve first-action completion.
main_uncertainty: Whether copy or missing product guidance causes the hesitation.
main_trade_off: Limit the change to copy so the team can learn without expanding onboarding scope.

user.strongest_signal: People repeatedly pause before the first setup action.
user.weakest_assumption: The action label is the primary source of confusion.
user.disconfirming_evidence: People still pause after the copy change.
user.stop_condition: The change reduces comprehension in a five-person check.

evidence.strongest_signal: Two independent internal sources show the same hesitation.
evidence.weakest_assumption: The replay sample represents new users.
evidence.disconfirming_evidence: Completion does not move after release.
evidence.stop_condition: No measurable event can distinguish the old and new copy.

business.strongest_signal: The change is reversible and may improve activation.
business.disconfirming_evidence: Completion rises while retained setup does not.
business.stop_condition: The change expands beyond copy and one action label.

next_smallest_action: Release one copy variant and compare first-action completion.

may_do: Edit the empty-state headline and one action label.
must_not_do: Change layout, permissions, data handling, or onboarding steps.
must_ask: A material scope, risk, data, or stakeholder impact changes.

stop_conditions: People still hesitate after the copy change.
The change requires onboarding scope expansion.
